item.title: Building the Perfect Job-Site Sawhorses
item.description: A set of durable job-site sawhorses is built from scratch for practical use during construction projects. The video showcases the design, fabrication process, and features that make them useful on the worksite. What tool would you build for your own projects?

media:content.media:title: Building the Perfect Job-Site Sawhorses
media:content.media:description: A set of durable job-site sawhorses is built from scratch for practical use during construction projects. The video showcases the design, fabrication process, and features that make them useful on the worksite. What tool would you build for your own projects?

item.title: $120K Income Property Build Timelapse
item.description: Watch an income property take shape through a detailed construction timelapse. The video follows the major stages of the build, showing the progress, craftsmanship, and work involved in creating a valuable investment property. What part of the build would you like to see in detail?

media:content.media:title: $120K Income Property Build Timelapse
media:content.media:description: Watch an income property take shape through a detailed construction timelapse. The video follows the major stages of the build, showing the progress, craftsmanship, and work involved in creating a valuable investment property. What part of the build would you like to see in detail?

item.title: Building a Dream Home Episode 46
item.description: Episode 46 follows the building process on a dream home project, with a focus on construction progress and hands-on work at the job site. What stage is the build at now?

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home Episode 46
media:content.media:description: Episode 46 follows the building process on a dream home project, with a focus on construction progress and hands-on work at the job site. What stage is the build at now?

item.title: My Saw Journey - Jaime's Advice!
item.description: A practical look at saw use and advice from the job site, focused on tools, technique, and hands-on building work. What stood out most in the saw journey?

media:content.media:title: My Saw Journey - Jaime's Advice!
media:content.media:description: A practical look at saw use and advice from the job site, focused on tools, technique, and hands-on building work. What stood out most in the saw journey?

item.title: This is how your roof stays up!
item.description: Learn how key structural components work together to support a roof and keep a home stable. The video explains the construction techniques and framing principles that provide strength and long-term durability. What part of home construction would you like to learn about next?

media:content.media:title: This is how your roof stays up!
media:content.media:description: Learn how key structural components work together to support a roof and keep a home stable. The video explains the construction techniques and framing principles that provide strength and long-term durability. What part of home construction would you like to learn about next?

item.title: Modern Home Building
item.description: A look at modern home building, with a focus on construction progress, tools, and the hands-on work that brings a project together. What part of the build process do you find most interesting?

media:content.media:title: Modern Home Building
media:content.media:description: A look at modern home building, with a focus on construction progress, tools, and the hands-on work that brings a project together. What part of the build process do you find most interesting?

item.title: Building Stairs: Easy Way to Mark and Cut Stringers
item.description: A practical look at marking and cutting stair stringers for a building project. Focused on the process, tools, and step-by-step craftsmanship. How do you approach stair layout?

media:content.media:title: Building Stairs: Easy Way to Mark and Cut Stringers
media:content.media:description: A practical look at marking and cutting stair stringers for a building project. Focused on the process, tools, and step-by-step craftsmanship. How do you approach stair layout?

item.title: Building the Walls for the Second Floor
item.description: A look at the wall-building process for the second floor, focused on construction progress and hands-on work on the job site. What comes next on the build?

media:content.media:title: Building the Walls for the Second Floor
media:content.media:description: A look at the wall-building process for the second floor, focused on construction progress and hands-on work on the job site. What comes next on the build?

item.title: nside the Dream Home Build: Episode 45
item.description: Follow the latest chapter in a dream home construction project as new milestones bring the build closer to completion. The video highlights ongoing craftsmanship, construction progress, and the work involved in creating a custom home. What part of the build are you most excited to see next?

media:content.media:title: nside the Dream Home Build: Episode 45
media:content.media:description: Follow the latest chapter in a dream home construction project as new milestones bring the build closer to completion. The video highlights ongoing craftsmanship, construction progress, and the work involved in creating a custom home. What part of the build are you most excited to see next?

item.title: Building a Dream Home Episode 45
item.description: Follow the latest progress in Episode 45 of a dream home build. The video showcases ongoing construction, key milestones, and the craftsmanship involved in bringing the project closer to completion. Which stage of the build has been your favorite so far?

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home Episode 45
